title: KoreanChat
description: Automatically convert English Alphabet to Korean Chat!
body:
# Fabric Server-side Mod that automatically convert English to Korean!

Example : dkssudgktpdy > 안녕하세요

Recommended to use with https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports

## Commands :

`/krc [on/off]` Enable/Disable conversion.

If you insert `"` in between , words inside of `"` doesn't get converted.

Example : dkssud? sks "Alex"di! > 안녕? 난 Alex야!

Compatible with Styled Chat! 

### Credits

**@N-Joy-Shadow** for former koreanchat mod developer


**@gisellevonbingen** for code contribution
